Describe the sequence of visual events occurring from the title card through the liquid pouring process.
canonical_answer: At 6s, the title text 'Beating Egg Whites' is centered on a white background; at 8s, hands pour yellowish liquid from a small clear glass bowl into a large stainless steel mixing bowl; at 10s, the liquid settles in the bowl containing a metal wire whisk attachment; at 16s, the whisk hovers above the bubbly liquid surface.

question: Describe the specific details visible on the mixing equipment and the state of the liquid during the preparation steps.
canonical_answer: At 8s, the brand name 'Cuisinart' is embossed on the rim of the large bowl while liquid is poured; at 10s, measurement markings are visible stamped on the inside rim of the stainless steel bowl; at 16s, visible air bubbles appear on the surface of the yellow translucent liquid as the whisk hovers above.
